calculators.title: Estonian Salary Calculator 2026
calculators.description: Calculate net salary from gross, including all taxes and contributions. Updated with current rates including the 2% security tax.
calculators.formula: net = gross - income_tax(22%) - unemployment(1.6%) - pension(2/4/6%) - security_tax(2%)
calculators.note: Security tax applies to gross income before any deductions.

calculators.title: Dividend Tax Calculator Estonia 2026
calculators.description: Calculate tax on distributed profits for Estonian companies. Includes corporate security tax information.
features: 2% security tax on total company profit (2026-2028)
calculators.note: Security tax applies to total company profit, not just distributed dividends.

calculators.title: VAT Calculator Estonia (24%) 2026
calculators.description: Add or remove VAT from amounts. Calculate VAT inclusive and exclusive prices with the standard 24% rate.
calculators.note: Standard VAT rate of 24% includes a 2% security tax component (valid 2025-2028).

calculators.title: Income Tax Calculator Estonia 2026
calculators.description: Calculate income tax on various types of income, including the new 2% security tax on gross income.
calculators.note: Security tax applies to gross income before tax-free allowance.

calculators.title: Freelancer Income Calculator 2026
calculators.description: Calculate after-tax income for freelancers (FIE), including income tax, social tax, security tax, and optional pension contributions.
features: Social tax on annual income with minimum base
calculators.note: Social tax is calculated on the full income with an annual minimum base (approx. €6,000/year).

calculators.title: Corporate Profit Tax Calculator 2026
calculators.description: Calculate the 2% security tax on corporate profit before distribution.
calculators.note: The 2% security tax applies to total company profit, regardless of whether it's distributed.
